calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda S. Forster, CSR #13286.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JM Associates, L.L.C., Agent for U.C. Hastings College of the Law.
Glen Johnson, Student Loan Accountant for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Drew Tyrrell, Director of Operations for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Milli E. Atkinson, a/k/a Milli Atkinson, a/k/a Millie Atkinson.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 20, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---UC Hastings - Promissory Note, dated 09/07/00----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Federal Perkins Loan Promissory Note, dated 06/02/06---------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff JM Associates, L.L.C., Agent for U.C. Hastings College of the Law, and against defendant Milli E. Atkinson, a/k/a Milli Atkinson, a/k/a Millie Atkinson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $9,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,151.18.
Attorney's Fees - $1,225.00.
Late Fee & Collection Costs - $7,434.12.
Costs - $380.00, for a total of $20,190,30.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
